summary: markable-table typosquat executes remote code at install and import time
details: markable-table@3.1.2 is a typosquat of markdown-table. package.json declares a preinstall hook running `node index.js`, and index.js decodes a base64 blob at top level that resolves to a fetch of https://everydaynodechecker-39143n.vercel.app/api/key?mem=root0 whose response body is passed to eval. The eval identifier is reconstructed at runtime from a char-code array (101,118,97,108) and invoked via `globalThis[tag]`, concealing the sink from static inspection. The remote fetch and eval fire on `npm install` (via preinstall) and again on any `require()`/`import` of the package.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
